---
title: "Example Quarto Document"
author: "Janelle Morano"
date: today()
format: html
params:
  commname: "Mahimahi"
  species: "*Corhyphaena hippurus*"

---

# Header 1 is Here
Stuff goes here, and you can refer to a parameter like this: `r params$commname` and `r params$species`.

## A second header
more stuff goes here

# Header 2 now
even more stuff goes here

```{r}
#| label: ex-chunk
#| eval: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: This is my figure caption.
#| fig-alt: This is my alternative text.
#| tbl-cap: This is my table caption.
x <- 1 + 1
```
